notes: The trap: the document DOES carry a ContentNegotiation entry whose source/target cover the requested pair, but without the REQUIRED profile member it makes no semantics-preservation claim and is outside the rdf-1 contract (rdf#capability), and conformsTo does not list the profile URI. A client keying on source/target alone would wrongly rely on RDF conneg here.
source: lws-spec@0f6b80f rdf#capability (spec-derived; no reference implementation yet)
title: clients MUST NOT attempt transformation-dependent behaviour against a storage that does not advertise the profile — a profile-less ContentNegotiation entry makes no rdf-1 claim
